name: French Vanilla Ice Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine sugar and cornstarch.
2. Gradually add milk and water, stirring constantly.
3. Over medium heat, bring mixture to a boil, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla.
5. Pour into an 8 x 8 x 2-inch metal pan.
6. Freeze until ice crystals form around the edge of pan, about one hour.
7. Spoon into a large bowl.
8. Beat at high speed until smooth.
9. Return to pan.
10. Repeat freezing and beating step once.
11. Freeze until firm.
12. Serve immediately.
Per sugar serving: 132 cal., 0.2g fat (2%), 2mg chol., 0g fiber, 6g pro., 26g carb., 94mg sod.
Per S&L serving: 102 cal., 18g carb.
